result.stdout_text:
json: Inspect JSON from stdin or a file: pretty, keys, get.
Usage: json pretty [path] | json keys [path] | json get <field.path> [path]

Uses a small dot-and-index path syntax such as customer.email or items[0].id. It is not jq.
Examples:
  fetch order:123 | json pretty
  fetch order:123 | json get customer.email
  json keys /config/default.json
